title: There’s a Lesson in That Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A black rock burned for heat and energy
choices: coal
encounter
misty
rounds.answer: coal
rounds.explanation: coal: A black rock burned for heat and energy

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A group of living things that are similar
choices: coal
encounter
species
rounds.answer: species
rounds.explanation: species: A group of living things that are similar

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A family member who lived a long time ago
choices: encounter
ancestor
coal
rounds.answer: ancestor
rounds.explanation: ancestor: A family member who lived a long time ago

rounds.answer: Related to the sea or ocean
